about.intro: I am a final-year Computer Science student passionate about web development and user-centric design. I enjoy transforming ideas into responsive, accessible interfaces. Currently exploring modern JavaScript frameworks and cloud basics to deliver scalable solutions.

about.career_goal: Start as a frontend or full-stack developer and grow into a product-focused engineer.
about.strengths: Detail-oriented, collaborative, quick learner, problem solver, clear communicator.
